Title: Sweep and Clear
Target: ~mission(client) / Multiple engagement
Sector Sweep
Staged Op: Sector Clearance
Search and Destroy
Combat Assist
Description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Hostile Sweep
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(approvalcode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Local authorities have been battling outlaw elements in system and have reached out for assistance. You are to fly to ~mission(rendezvous) and clear out any hostile elements you encounter. ~mission(danger)

If you accept this contract, you must be ready and able to start work immediately.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Hostile Sweep
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(approvalcode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Eckhart Security will be lending a hand to ~mission(contractor) to help with security in system. You will be given an AO of several points and will be responsible for sweeping the area and clearing of any hostile elements. Intel suggests that you may be coming in contact with ~mission(client). ~mission(danger)

If you accept this contract, you must be ready and able to start work immediately.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
Danger: Intel reports that ~mission(client) are common in your area, indicating that they may have a small base there. Expect a fight if encountered.
Use extreme caution. Latest CrimeStats indicate an increased number of attacks on your route.
The likelihood of heavy enemy engagement is very high. Make sure you prepare accordingly.
The ~mission(client) have been ramping up their aggression recently. You should expect heavy resistance if engaged.
Rendezvous: It's not going to be an easy task. The ~mission(Client) have some serious fighters in their ranks.
